title: The Idols That Saved the Earth
overview: Asuka, Kyouko, and Mirai are scouted by a talking gorilla to become idols! But their idol training seems to consist mostly of working in an arcade... and saving the world?!

title: Ready to Slide It?
overview: The Crane Game Girls learn their first secret training technique: The Slide!

title: Pull Off a Hole Hook
overview: The wannabe idols try to learn the trick to retrieving box-type prizes from the crane game. But does Mirai know a faster way?

title: The Beautiful Niagra Drop!
overview: The girls attempt the "Niagra Drop," a crane game technique for securing many small prizes at once.

title: Tagging License
overview: As the asteroids draw closer to the planet, Mirai must invoke her family fishing skills to master the tag grab technique!

title: Strung Along to the Secret
overview: It's time for the girls to learn the secret of their mission... but only if they can master the trick of catching a prize by the string!

title: The Broken Promise
overview: When the girls learn they've been crane gaming under false pretenses, will they knuckle under to save the Earth? Or will they leave it to its fate?!

title: Protect Everyone's Earth!
overview: Asuka and Kyouko have decided to keep playing crane games to save the Earth, but Mirai is determined to leave! Can CEO Gorilla make a bargain to save the day?

title: Hot Springs Training in the Gap!
overview: The Crane Game Girls take a relaxing rest at a hot springs, but their vacation is cut short when Boss Gorilla runs into an old rival. Can they master the new gap-grabbing technique and win the sexy gorilla prize?

title: Flip the World
overview: The Crane Game Girls' identities have been revealed to the world, and they're well on their way to becoming the idols they dreamed they'd be... but only if they can master a new technique without the boss's advice!

title: Hack and Slash to Win!
overview: The boss has been kidnapped and a final asteroid is approaching the Earth, bigger than any before it! Can they pull off a final crane game technique big enough to save the day?!

title: Triangle of Hope!
overview: The Crane Game Girls learn of one last way to change the asteroid's course... but will it cost them their lives to do it?!

title: Crane Game Girls
overview: The Crane Game Girls use the last of their power on the Dark Gorilla asteroid! Can they survive? And what of the fate of their boss?!
